location.office_time_required: 3 days per week on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and a third flex day; up to 4 weeks remote per year

level_signals: Comp range $220K-$302.5K base, consistent with Staff IC level
Expected to define strategy and present to senior leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 8+ years of experience in product at a high-growth tech startup or as a startup founder.
must_haves.qualifier: at a high-growth tech startup or as a startup founder

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You are good at deeply understanding customer needs and underlying motivations, especially in spaces where customers aren't great at predicting how changes will impact their behavior
You're an inspiring leader who is excited about the day-to-day of understanding our customers and working with a strong team to build improvements for them.
You're an extraordinarily fast learner. You have the natural curiosity and intellectual horsepower to deeply understand new topics and pick up new skills in a very short time.

You are relentlessly resourceful. When something needs to get done, you always find a way to make it happen. Even when the work is hard, you power through it and execute with limited information and ambiguity.
You are a creative problem-solver. You excel at identifying unintuitive solutions to tough problems.
You care deeply about developing products and solutions that will create the best experience for our customers.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: If you love complex marketplace dynamics, have strong intuitions about how pricing affects buyer behavior, and get excited about building products that create real, measurable value for small business owners — this is the role for you.
Partner with engineering and data science to build the data infrastructure that powers pricing insights and recommendations at scale.

scope.surface: Brand Pricing — pricing tools, insights, and recommendations for brands on the Faire wholesale marketplace
scope.business_model: B2B marketplace (wholesale platform connecting independent retailers and brands)
primary_metrics_inferred: Adoption of pricing tools by brands
core_responsibilities: Define how Faire thinks about pricing across the marketplace — balancing brand economics, retailer trust, and long-term marketplace growth
Own the pricing roadmap end-to-end across insights, tools, and data
Build brand-facing products including price management interfaces and intelligent recommendations
Partner with engineering and data science to build data infrastructure for pricing insights and recommendations at scale
Use analytics and frameworks to guide build vs. buy decisions and present recommendations to senior leadership

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and wide ($220K-$302.5K base)
Clear product surface and ownership area (pricing for brands on Faire)
Hybrid with 4 weeks of remote flexibility annually
red_flags: Hybrid requires 3 days/week in San Francisco office — fully remote candidates ineligible
No explicit mention of visa sponsorship or work authorization
8+ years requirement with Staff title is a high bar; career switchers unlikely to qualify
Domain (marketplace pricing for SMB wholesale) is niche — may require significant ramp time

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Staff PM', comp range, and years required)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
nice_to_haves: marketplace_dynamics_passion and data_infrastructure_partnership inferred from responsibilities section, not a formal 'preferred' list
ambiguities: The JD does not have a separate 'Preferred' or 'Nice to have' section; nice-to-haves were inferred from aspirational framing ('If you love...') and responsibilities language, which may actually be implicit must-haves depending on hiring bar.
Compensation listed only for San Francisco, CA; JD does not clarify whether remote US candidates (outside SF) are eligible or what pay they would receive.
